title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
summary: Meta disabled its newly announced AI image generation feature on Instagram that allowed users to create deepfakes from public accounts without owner consent. The company acknowledged the feature "missed the mark" following widespread criticism over privacy and consent.
content: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available."

zh.title: Meta在遭到反对后从Instagram移除有争议的AI功能
zh.summary: Meta禁用了其新推出的Instagram AI图像生成功能，该功能允许用户在未经所有者同意的情况下从公开账户创建深度伪造。该公司承认该功能"未能达到预期"，因为涉及隐私和同意问题。

title: Meta turns off the Instagram feature that let users make AI deepfakes of public accounts
summary: Meta disabled its new Muse Image AI feature that allowed users to reference public Instagram accounts in AI-generated images without account owner permission. The rapid removal follows significant backlash over consent and privacy violations.
content:
Following significant backlash, Meta is turning off the feature it announced this week that let users generate AI images based on content from public Instagram accounts just by tagging them. The feature, as originally set up, meant that content from any public Instagram account could be used in AI creations without the account owner's permission.
"Earlier this week, we announced that one way for people to generate images in Meta AI is by @-mentioning public Instagram accounts that they want to reference," Meta says in an update to a blog post about its new Muse Image AI model. "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give pe …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Meta关闭了允许用户制作公开账户AI深度伪造的Instagram功能
zh.summary: Meta禁用了其新的Muse Image AI功能，该功能允许用户在未获得账户所有者许可的情况下在AI生成的图像中引用公开Instagram账户。快速移除是由于对同意和隐私违规的重大反对。

title: Quantum error correction can constantly recalibrate a processor
summary: Researchers developed a quantum error correction method using reinforcement learning to continuously adjust control algorithms, improving processor stability. This breakthrough could significantly enhance the reliability and viability of quantum computers.
content: Reinforcement learning uses error information to adjust control algorithms.

zh.title: 量子纠错可以不断重新校准处理器
zh.summary: 研究人员开发了一种使用强化学习的量子纠错方法，可以持续调整控制算法，改进处理器稳定性。这一突破可能会显著增强量子计算机的可靠性和可行性。

title: Increased drone surveillance of illegal July 4th fireworks led to $100K fine
summary: Law enforcement agencies increasingly deploy drones to monitor and deter illegal fireworks, with one operation resulting in a $100,000 fine. The trend reflects expanding use of aerial surveillance for public safety enforcement.
content: More police and firefighters use drones to catch and deter illegal fireworks.

zh.title: 无人机监视非法七月四日烟火增加，导致10万美元罚款
zh.summary: 执法机构越来越多地部署无人机来监视和阻止非法烟火，其中一次行动导致10万美元罚款。这一趋势反映了无人机在公共安全执法中的扩大应用。

title: The FCC is cracking down on DJI tech that dodged the foreign drone ban
summary: The FCC is fining eight companies $25,000 each for operating as apparent "front companies" for DJI, circumventing the U.S. foreign drone ban. Companies have until July 20 to respond before the agency pursues further enforcement.
content:
The Xtra Muse and the DJI Osmo Pocket 3. | Photo by Sean Hollister / The Verge	

Last year, we told you about Xtra, the company that lets DJI sneak its popular cameras into the US, and Skyrover, a brand seemingly selling DJI drones in disguise. They're just two of the many firms DJI is suspected of starting to skirt the United States' foreign drone ban.
But it appears the FCC is finally doing something about "DJI front companies," as watcher Konrad Iturbe dubbed them last year.  Today, the FCC is fining eight of them $25,000 each - and giving them until Monday, July 20th, just 10 calendar days, to answer the FCC's questions before the agency takes further action.
Those companies include Cogito Tech, Fixaxo Technology,  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: FCC打击规避外国无人机禁令的大疆技术
zh.summary: 美国联邦通信委员会对8家公司各罚款2.5万美元，这些公司涉嫌充当大疆的"幌子公司"，规避美国外国无人机禁令。这些公司需要在7月20日前做出回应，否则该机构将采取进一步执法行动。

title: Bluesky’s interim CEO, Toni Schneider, drops the ‘interim’
summary: Toni Schneider, former Automattic CEO and True Ventures partner, is becoming permanent CEO of Bluesky and states he is "all in" on the decentralized social media platform. The appointment signals strong confidence in Bluesky's future direction.
content: Schneider, who formerly served as the CEO of Automattic and is a partner at True Ventures, says he is "all in" on the unconventional social media platform.

zh.title: Bluesky代理CEO托尼·施奈德正式转正
zh.summary: 前Automattic首席执行官和True Ventures合伙人托尼·施奈德成为Bluesky的永久首席执行官，并表示他对这个去中心化社交媒体平台"全力投入"。这一任命表明对Bluesky未来方向的强烈信心。

title: China recovered its first reusable rocket and showed a new way to do it
summary: China successfully recovered its first reusable rocket, demonstrating a new recovery method similar to SpaceX's approach. The achievement signals China's growing capabilities and ambitions in commercial spaceflight technology.
content: "Clearly, they admire the work that's being done by SpaceX and are trying to replicate it."

zh.title: 中国成功回收首枚可重复使用火箭，展示了全新的回收方式
zh.summary: 中国成功回收了首枚可重复使用火箭，展示了一种类似SpaceX方法的新型回收方式。这一成就标志着中国在商业航天技术领域的能力和雄心不断增长。

title: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
summary: Apple sued OpenAI and Jony Ive's IO Products for alleged theft of trade secrets by former Apple employees, including OpenAI's chief hardware officer Tang Tan. The lawsuit alleges a pattern of misconduct directed by OpenAI's senior leadership.
content:
Apple has sued OpenAI, alleging that engineers stole Apple secrets to advance the AI startup's hardware plans. In its complaint, Apple says it uncovered "a pattern of theft of Apple's trade secrets by OpenAI employees who were formerly at Apple." In addition to OpenAI, the lawsuit also names IO Products - Jony Ive's hardware startup, which OpenAI bought in 2025 - along with two specific employees, Tang Tan (OpenAI's chief hardware officer) and Chang Liu (who joined OpenAI from Apple in January).
An Apple spokesperson shared this statement with 9to5Mac:
At Apple, our teams are constantly developing breakthrough technologies to create the b …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果起诉OpenAI涉嫌窃取硬件机密
zh.summary: 苹果起诉OpenAI和Jony Ive的IO Products，指控前苹果员工包括OpenAI首席硬件官Tang Tan窃取商业机密。诉讼声称存在由OpenAI高管指导的一系列不当行为模式。

title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
summary: Apple filed a lawsuit against OpenAI alleging senior leadership directed employees to steal proprietary technology to advance hardware plans. The suit also names IO Products, which OpenAI acquired in 2025.
content: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

zh.title: 苹果就涉嫌商业机密窃取起诉OpenAI
zh.summary: 苹果对OpenAI提起诉讼，指控其高管指导员工窃取专有技术以推进硬件计划。诉讼还点名了OpenAI在2025年收购的IO Products。

title: Check out the first images of Quest shipwreck
summary: The first photographs of the sunken Quest ship reveal it is in worse condition than expected, yet has become a thriving marine ecosystem. The discovery provides unprecedented visual documentation of the historic wreck.
content: The Quest shipwreck is in worse shape than expected, but it has turned into a thriving marine ecosystem.

zh.title: 首次曝光Quest沉船的图像
zh.summary: 已沉没的Quest号船舶的首批照片显示其状况比预期更糟，但已成为生机勃勃的海洋生态系统。这一发现为这艘历史沉船提供了前所未有的视觉文献记录。

title: A decade later, Pokémon Go finally made good on its original promise
summary: At its 10th anniversary event in Times Square, Pokémon Go demonstrated its long-awaited multiplayer vision when nearly 2,000 players participated in a coordinated battle against Mewtwo. The event fulfilled the ambitious promise from the game's original 2015 trailer.
content:
When Niantic dropped the first Pokémon Go trailer in 2015, it was hard to grasp how a bunch of players could work together to catch a pokémon like Mewtwo. But this week at the game's 10th anniversary event in New York City, Pokémon Go showed the world how it's done. Almost 2,000 players (many of them Pokémon Go influencers) packed into Times Square on Thursday evening to participate in a special battle. It was cool to see Times Square briefly go dark before the billboards began lighting up, revealing an escaped Mewtwo Mega Evolving, and it was even wilder to see people living the fantasy depicted in the game's first trailer. 
Even though mo …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 十年后，Pokémon Go终于兑现了最初的承诺
zh.summary: 在时代广场举办的10周年纪念活动中，Pokémon Go展示了期待已久的多人游戏愿景，近2000名玩家参与了针对超梦的协调战斗。这次活动兑现了游戏2015年原始预告片中的雄心勃勃承诺。

title: Ransomware negotiator hired to represent victims was working for the attackers
summary: A man hired to negotiate ransom payments on behalf of victims was secretly working for the attackers, effectively betraying those he was supposed to represent. He received a six-year prison sentence for this fraud.
content: Six years in prison for man who "sold out the very victims he was hired to represent."

zh.title: 被聘为受害者代理的勒索软件谈判代表实为攻击者的帮凶
zh.summary: 一名被聘用代表受害者协商赎金的男子实际上一直在暗中为攻击者工作，他背叛了本应代表的受害者。他因这项欺诈行为被判处六年监禁。

title: Study shows how toxic RFK Jr.’s change to measles vaccine is for US toddlers
summary: A study reveals the potential harm of RFK Jr.'s proposed changes to measles vaccination policy for US toddlers, particularly children receiving combination vaccine shots. The research underscores the vulnerability of this population to shifts in vaccination standards.
content: The children who get a combination shot are some of the most vulnerable.

zh.title: 研究显示RFK Jr.对麻疹疫苗的改变对美国幼儿危害有多大
zh.summary: 一项研究揭示了RFK Jr.提议的麻疹疫苗接种政策改变可能对美国幼儿造成的伤害，特别是对接受联合疫苗注射的儿童。该研究强调了这个群体对疫苗接种标准变化的脆弱性。

title: ICE is threatening to deport witnesses of its latest shooting
summary: A Mexican immigrant was fatally shot by ICE officers during a traffic stop in Houston; advocates demand bodycam footage, but DHS claims equipment wasn't available due to a 76-day government shutdown that prevented funding.
content:
Department of Homeland Security. | Image: The Verge	

Advocates are demanding that the Department of Homeland Security release bodycam footage of the fatal shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, a Mexican immigrant who was killed by ICE officers in Houston during a traffic stop earlier this week. But DHS claims the agents involved in the shooting weren't wearing body cameras because of the lengthy government shutdown that prevented ICE and Customs and Border Protection from receiving additional federal funding for 76 days - a shutdown that was itself spurred by congressional bickering over reforms to DHS after federal agents killed two civilians earlier this year.
Two competing narratives have em …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: ICE威胁驱逐其枪击事件的证人
zh.summary: 一名墨西哥移民在休斯顿的交通检查中被ICE警官致命枪杀;倡导者要求提供执法记录仪录像,但国土安全部声称由于长达76天的政府停摆导致资金不足,设备无法使用。

title: Filing: College app Fizz accuses VC of sharing confidential startup information with rival Sidechat
summary: College app Fizz has expanded its lawsuit against rival Sidechat, alleging that a Maveron venture capital firm shared confidential startup information obtained during a fundraising meeting.
content: Fizz has expanded its lawsuit against rival Sidechat, alleging that a Maveron VC shared its confidential information obtained during a fundraising meeting with the competing startup.

zh.title: 诉状:大学应用Fizz指责风投向竞争对手Sidechat泄露机密信息
zh.summary: 大学应用Fizz扩大了对竞争对手Sidechat的诉讼,声称Maveron风险投资公司在融资会议中获得的机密初创信息被该公司分享。

title: Nvidia’s biggest RAM supplier just had a trillion-dollar debut on Wall Street
summary: SK Hynix, a major memory chip supplier benefiting from surging AI demand, achieved the largest foreign company IPO debut in US history, raising $26.5 billion and surpassing Alibaba's previous record.
content:
SK Hynix CEO Kwak Noh-Jung. | Image: Michael Nagle/Bloomberg via Getty Images	

As the AI boom boosts demand for RAM, SK Hynix - one of the world's biggest suppliers of memory chips - launched on Wall Street Friday. The South Korean chipmaker opened at $170 per share and raised $26.5 billion, surpassing Alibaba's record as the largest debut of a foreign company, according to reports from The Associated Press and CNN.
After reaching a $1 trillion valuation in May, SK Hynix briefly overtook Samsung as South Korea's most valuable company. SK Hynix is one of three major companies benefitting from a surge in demand for DRAM and high-bandwidth memory (HBM). These components have become essential for the widespread buildout o …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 英伟达最大内存供应商在华尔街完成万亿美元级首秀
zh.summary: 作为从激增的AI需求中受益的主要内存芯片供应商,SK海力士在美国历史上实现了最大规模的外国公司IPO首次亮相,融资265亿美元,超越了阿里巴巴之前的记录。

title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
summary: SK Hynix's record-breaking $26.5 billion IPO reflects booming demand for AI chips, as the South Korean chipmaker faces pressure to establish new manufacturing facilities in the United States.
content: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

zh.title: SK海力士融资265亿美元创美国历史上最大外资IPO，被敦促在美国建设新芯片代工厂
zh.summary: SK海力士创纪录的265亿美元IPO反映了对AI芯片的旺盛需求，这家韩国芯片制造商面临在美国建立新制造设施的压力。

title: A new app, HyperTexting, turns the open web into a scrollable social media-like feed
summary: HyperTexting's new app transforms the open web into a social media-style scrollable feed, allowing users to discover and share content from websites, blogs, newsletters, and podcasts.
content: HyperTexting's new app aims to make the open web feel more like social media by turning websites, blogs, newsletters, and podcasts into a scrollable feed, while also making it easier to post to your own website.

zh.title: 新应用HyperTexting将开放网络转变为可滚动的类社交媒体信息流
zh.summary: HyperTexting的新应用将开放网络转变为社交媒体风格的可滚动信息流，允许用户发现和分享来自网站、博客、新闻通讯和播客的内容。

title: Spotify will let you fine-tune your weekly Release Radar playlist
summary: Spotify is rolling out new customization options for its popular Release Radar playlist, allowing users to filter by genre and focus on artist discovery preferences across mobile and desktop apps.
content:
Spotify is giving listeners control to fine-tune what gets surfaced for them in Release Radar - one of its most popular weekly playlists. The new options allow you to narrow the playlist to a specific genre, focus on artists that are new to you, and more. Listeners can choose from up to five options like "Discover new artists," "Editors' picks," and "Pop." They're rolling out now across mobile and desktop apps and will appear at the top of your Release Radar playlist once they're available.
Spotify also says it's making tweaks to the algorithm to serve up "more personalized recommendations," along with a new look featuring updated cover and …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Spotify将推出每周Release Radar播放列表的微调功能
zh.summary: Spotify推出了其热门Release Radar播放列表的新自定义选项，允许用户在移动和桌面应用上按流派过滤并专注于艺术家发现偏好。

title: Valve's new Steam Machine verification system is silent on these Steam Deck-busters
summary: Valve's Steam Deck verification system has left dozens of demanding games unrated, failing to clearly communicate compatibility for titles too resource-intensive for the handheld device.
content: Dozens of titles too taxing for Steam Deck are still unrated for the new hardware.

zh.title: Valve新的Steam机器验证系统对这些Steam Deck杀手游戏保持沉默
zh.summary: Valve的Steam Deck验证系统对数十款要求资源密集的游戏未作评级，未能清楚地说明对这些对手持设备要求过高的游戏的兼容性。

title: China is catching up to Elon Musk’s reusable rockets
summary: China's state-owned space company achieved a significant milestone by successfully recovering an orbital rocket booster after launch, narrowing the technological gap with SpaceX's reusable rocket capabilities.
content: China's state-owned space company recovered its first orbital rocket booster after launch.

zh.title: 中国正在追赶埃隆·马斯克的可重复使用火箭
zh.summary: 中国国有航天公司通过成功回收发射后的轨道火箭助推器取得了重大里程碑，缩小了与SpaceX可重复使用火箭能力的技术差距。

title: Firmware update bricks Hue Bridge Pro devices; Philips gives free replacements
summary: A faulty firmware update bricked Philips Hue Bridge Pro smart home devices, forcing users to reconfigure their lights and settings; Philips is offering free replacements for affected customers.
content: Affected users will have to configure their lights and settings all over again.

zh.title: 固件更新导致Hue Bridge Pro设备损坏；飞利浦提供免费更换
zh.summary: 一次有缺陷的固件更新导致飞利浦Hue Bridge Pro智能家居设备损坏，迫使用户重新配置其灯光和设置；飞利浦正为受影响的客户提供免费更换。

title: Netflix is turning into YouTube
summary: Netflix continues expanding beyond traditional streaming into gaming, live sports, podcasts, and now YouTube-style content, raising questions about the company's strategic direction as competition intensifies.
content:
Netflix has shows and movies. And video games. And live sports. And podcasts. And also, apparently, YouTube videos? For a company that used to seem like the next big thing in TV, it all feels a little frenetic, and maybe a tad desperate. For a company that sees sleep as its primary competitor, it might all make perfect sense.
On this episode of The Vergecast, David and Nilay try to figure out why Netflix continues to expand its content machine and whether the company's ongoing YouTube-ification makes any sense at all. Many have tried to compete with YouTube; none have succeeded. Does that mean Netflix might inch its way up the Go90 Scale of …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Netflix 正在变成 YouTube
zh.summary: Netflix 继续扩展超越传统流媒体，涉足游戏、直播体育、播客以及类似 YouTube 的内容，在竞争加剧之际引发了对该公司战略方向的疑问。

title: Disney+ is considering a free streaming tier, report says
summary: Disney+ is exploring a free streaming tier to compete with ad-supported platforms like YouTube and Tubi as consumers increasingly shift viewing time away from paid subscription services.
content: The launch of free content would allow Disney+ to better compete with free services like YouTube and Tubi, which are capturing a growing share of consumers’ viewing time.

zh.title: 报道称 Disney+ 正在考虑推出免费流媒体套餐
zh.summary: 随着消费者逐渐将观看时间从付费订阅服务转向其他平台，Disney+ 正在探索免费流媒体套餐以与 YouTube 和 Tubi 等广告支持的平台竞争。

title: An orbiting disco ball gave Einstein’s theory its most precise test yet
summary: Scientists used an orbiting satellite to conduct the most precise test of Einstein's theory of general relativity, confirming that Earth's mass warps space-time exactly as predicted by the theory.
content: The Earth may not be that massive, but it still distorts space-time.

zh.title: 轨道迪斯科球为爱因斯坦理论进行了迄今为止最精确的测试
zh.summary: 科学家利用轨道卫星对爱因斯坦的广义相对论进行了迄今为止最精确的测试，确认地球的质量恰好按照该理论的预测弯曲了时空。

title: Dumb Co dared me to trade my iPhone for a hacked flip phone
summary: Dumb Co's new flip phones aim to reduce smartphone dependency by syncing with iPhones while offering the simpler functionality and limitations of early 2000s devices.
content: Dumb Co sells flip phones that sync to your smartphone, bridging the infinite connectivity of the iPhone and the unrealistic limitations of an early 2000s relic.

zh.title: Dumb Co挑战我用被破解的翻盖手机换iPhone
zh.summary: Dumb Co的新翻盖手机旨在通过与iPhone同步来减少智能手机依赖，同时提供2000年代早期设备的更简单功能和限制。

title: Disable autoplay and infinite scroll or risk massive fines, EU tells Meta
summary: The EU's Digital Services Act could force Meta to disable autoplay and infinite scroll features or face massive fines, representing a significant regulatory challenge to the company's core engagement model.
content: Digital Services Act may force Meta to make big changes on its platforms.

zh.title: 禁用自动播放和无限滚动否则面临巨额罚款，欧盟告诉Meta
zh.summary: 欧盟的《数字服务法》可能会迫使Meta禁用自动播放和无限滚动功能，否则将面临巨额罚款，这对该公司的核心参与模式构成了重大监管挑战。

title: Disney Plus is reportedly looking into a free streaming tier
summary: Disney+ is exploring a free streaming tier as part of broader efforts to compete with YouTube and other ad-supported platforms that are increasingly capturing viewers' time and attention.
content:
Disney Plus is considering making some of its content free to watch, according to a report from Business Insider. A source tells the outlet that Adam Smith, Disney's chief product and technology officer, mentioned a free streaming tier during the company's town hall on Thursday.
It's not clear which shows or movies the purported free streaming tier involves, or when Disney would consider rolling it out, but Business Insider reports that it's "part of an ongoing discussion about concepts to better serve fans." Disney didn't immediately respond to The Verge's request for comment.
With YouTube taking up a large portion of viewers' time in fro …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Disney+据报道正在探索免费流媒体层级
zh.summary: Disney+正在探索免费流媒体层级，作为与YouTube和其他广告支持平台竞争的更广泛努力的一部分，这些平台越来越多地吸引观众的时间和注意力。

title: NASA sure seems to be asking an awful lot of private space stations
summary: NASA has articulated substantial requirements for private space station development, with industry now understanding the full scope of the agency's demands. These expectations represent a significant technical and operational undertaking for commercial space companies.
content: "Industry finally knows what NASA is asking of them."

zh.title: NASA对私人空间站的要求似乎太高了
zh.summary: NASA已经阐述了私人空间站开发的实质性要求，业界现在理解了该机构需求的全面范围。这些期望对商业航天公司来说代表了重大的技术和运营挑战。

title: Oratomic raises $300M to build a viable quantum computer that needs only 20K qubits
summary: Quantum computing startup Oratomic raised $300 million in funding from ARCH Venture Partners, Spark Capital, and Khosla Ventures. The company aims to build a viable quantum computer requiring just 20,000 qubits, potentially more efficient than competitors' approaches.
content: The massive round was co-led by ARCH Venture Partners, Spark Capital, and Khosla Ventures.

zh.title: Oratomic融资3亿美元打造仅需2万量子比特的可行量子计算机
zh.summary: 量子计算初创公司Oratomic从ARCH Venture Partners、Spark Capital和Khosla Ventures筹集了3亿美元。该公司目标是打造一台仅需要20,000个量子比特的可行量子计算机，其方法可能比竞争对手的方案更加高效。

title: Netflix could be planning ‘always-on’ live TV channels
summary: Netflix is considering launching always-on live TV channels to combat slowing user engagement on the platform. The feature would offer subscribers 24/7 scheduled programming, marking a shift from the service's traditional on-demand model.
content: Amid signs of slowing engagement,  Netflix is reportedly considering launching "always-on" live channels, giving subscribers something to tune into 24/7.

zh.title: Netflix考虑推出"常驻"直播电视频道
zh.summary: Netflix正在考虑推出常驻直播电视频道，以应对该平台用户参与度下降的问题。该功能将为订阅者提供24/7的定时节目内容，标志着该服务从传统按需模式的转变。

title: EU threatens Meta with fines over addictive features on Facebook and Instagram
summary: The European Commission found Meta in breach of the Digital Services Act for addictive design features including infinite scroll, autoplay, and personalized recommendations on Facebook and Instagram. Meta faces potential fines up to $12 billion and mandatory redesigns of both platforms.
content: The tech giant is in breach of the Digital Services Act by focusing on features like infinite scroll, autoplay, push notifications, and the highly personalized recommendation algorithms, the European Commission said.

zh.title: 欧盟以成瘾功能为由威胁对Meta罚款
zh.summary: 欧盟委员会因Meta在Facebook和Instagram上的成瘾设计功能（包括无限滚动、自动播放和个性化推荐）违反《数字服务法》而对其进行处罚。Meta面临高达120亿美元的潜在罚款和两个平台的强制性重新设计。

title: Florida ransomware negotiator convicted for helping ransomware gang extort US companies
summary: A Florida ransomware negotiator has been convicted and jailed for assisting a notorious ransomware group in extorting US companies. The conviction is the third against individuals helping ransomware operations, signaling increased legal consequences for facilitators.
content: A third ransomware negotiator has been jailed for helping a notorious ransomware group to extort American victim companies into paying the hackers.

zh.title: 佛罗里达勒索软件协商者因协助勒索软件团伙敲诈美国公司而被定罪
zh.summary: 一名佛罗里达勒索软件协商者因协助著名勒索软件组织敲诈美国公司而被定罪并监禁。这是针对协助勒索软件行动的个人的第三次定罪，表明对便利者的法律后果在增加。

title: I’m filling in at The Verge for 6 weeks. Ask me anything!
summary: David Piercy, a technology reporter and Waveform Podcast cohost, is filling in as a senior reviewer at The Verge for six weeks covering new releases from Apple, Google, and Samsung. Piercy has previously contributed camera reviews and podcast content to the publication.
content:
Hello my friends! My protocol pals! My computational compadres!
I'm David, a technology reporter and cohost of the Waveform Podcast. I'll be hosting a subscriber-only "AMA" today at 11AM PT / 2PM ET. For the next six weeks, I'm filling in for senior reviewer Allison Johnson, who you are all likely very familiar with. That means I'll be covering new releases from Apple, Google, Samsung, and the works. I've already done some freelancing for The Verge, including camera reviews, attending the Switch 2 launch event, and cohosting episodes of the Vergecast and Version History, so you may have seen me before!
I've been covering technology since a …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我在The Verge代岗6周。有任何问题尽管问！
zh.summary: 技术记者和Waveform播客联合主持人David Piercy将在The Verge代岗6周，担任高级评论员，覆盖Apple、Google和Samsung的新品发布。Piercy之前曾为该出版物贡献过相机评论和播客内容。

title: Empathy for the optimizers
summary: Biohacker Bryan Johnson announced he has an incurable autoimmune disease, contradicting his well-publicized mission to achieve immortality through extreme health optimization. The revelation sparked debate about the limits of biohacking and Johnson's controversial methodologies.
content:
This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. Opt in for Optimizer here.
Bryan Johnson, best known as the man who wants to live forever, has an incurable autoimmune disease. The internet's most famous biohacker made the announcement on June 30th, sparking a barrage of takes. 
If you've never heard of Johnson, the CliffsNotes are that he's made it his personal mission to never die. That's not hyperbole - there's an entire Netflix documentary about how the man spends a veritable fortune turning himsel …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 对优化者的同情
zh.summary: 生物黑客布莱恩·约翰逊宣布患有不可治愈的自身免疫病，与其备受宣传的通过极端健康优化实现永生的使命相悖。这一揭露引发了关于生物黑客局限性和约翰逊争议性方法论的辩论。

title: Hugging Face’s CEO on why companies are done renting their AI
summary: Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue highlights the surging open-source AI movement, with companies shifting away from proprietary AI rentals toward open models. The platform, functioning as a GitHub for AI, is now used by approximately half of Fortune 500 companies.
content: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Delangue has seen the same story play out again and again: companies start […]

zh.title: Hugging Face首席执行官谈公司为何不再租赁AI
zh.summary: Hugging Face首席执行官Clem Delangue强调了开源AI运动的快速增长，各公司正在从专有AI租赁转向开源模型。这个被称为AI的GitHub的平台现在被约一半的财富500强公司使用。

title: VW Group and unions disagree on plan to streamline the automaker
summary: Volkswagen Group's restructuring plan proposes cutting its model lineup in half but remains vague on facility closures and workforce reductions. The proposal has created disagreement between the company and unions over implementation details.
content: VW's plan calls for half as many models but didn't mention closures or job cuts.

zh.title: 大众集团与工会在精简计划上意见不合
zh.summary: 大众集团的重组计划提议将车型阵容削减一半，但对工厂关闭和员工裁减方面仍语焉不详。该提议在公司与工会之间就实施细节产生了分歧。

title: Instagram’s Adam Mosseri: If you don’t like AI, ‘then you shouldn’t have it in your feed’
summary: Instagram head Adam Mosseri announced the platform will label AI-generated content rather than filter it out entirely, allowing users to customize their feeds based on AI content preferences. The approach represents a middle ground between banning AI content and promoting it unchecked.
content:
Though Instagram head Adam Mosseri doesn't want to filter out AI content on the platform, he argues that you "shouldn't have it in your feed" if you don't like it. "I don't think we should filter out AI content," Mosseri said during an interview on Lenny Rachitsky's podcast. "I think we should let you know if content is AI content or not."
At the same time, Mosseri seems to be drawing a distinction between content-based sorting and banning AI from the platform entirely. In fact, he believes people who love AI content "should be able to have a feed that's just AI town." Instagram, like many other platforms, including TikTok, YouTube, and Fac …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Instagram首席执行官莫塞里：如果你不喜欢人工智能，就不应该在信息流中看到它
zh.summary: Instagram负责人亚当·莫塞里宣布该平台将标记人工智能生成的内容，而非完全过滤，允许用户根据偏好自定义信息流中的人工智能内容。这种方法在禁止人工智能内容和无限制推广之间找到了平衡点。

title: Would you host part of an AI data center in your home?
summary: Sunrun is launching a pilot program placing AI compute nodes in customers' homes equipped with solar and battery systems, compensating participants for the infrastructure. The distributed model offers a novel approach to providing compute resources for AI companies while leveraging existing home energy systems.
content:
A solar and home energy storage company is expanding into AI data centers, but not by building one - instead, it's offering to pay its customers to put its compute units in their homes. Sunrun is launching a pilot program for a new "distributed AI compute" program that will "place numerous compute nodes in homes equipped with Sunrun solar and battery storage systems." Customers will be "compensated" for participating in the pilot program. 
Sunrun plans to sell the distributed compute power from the nodes to "enterprise compute buyers," like AI companies. It's a new approach to finding resources and space for AI compute infrastructure, as da …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 你会在家里安装AI数据中心的一部分吗?
zh.summary: Sunrun正在推出一个试点项目，在配备太阳能和电池系统的客户家中放置AI计算节点，并为参与者补偿基础设施成本。这种分布式模式为AI公司提供了一种新颖的方式来获取计算资源，同时利用现有的家庭能源系统。

title: Xreal’s new AR glasses are way cheaper and almost just right
summary: Xreal's new $299 A01 Plus AR glasses deliver lightweight design at 62 grams with surprisingly bright and contrast-rich displays for the price. While the stripped-down version of the $449 1S feels less durable, it offers strong value for casual AR users.
content:
The modular blue-tinted glasses shell included with the A01 Plus won’t turn your content blue. | Photo: Cameron Faulkner / The Verge	

I love it when a company challenges itself to make a cheaper version of a beloved product. Xreal's $299 A01 Plus is a stripped-down version of its $449 1S that's light on features but with just enough of the 1S' best qualities. These AR glasses are comfortable, they look good, and the screens are surprisingly bright and contrast-rich for the price. 
The new glasses are super lightweight at 62 grams - over 20 grams lighter than the 1S. They're as light as I wish every model was, but the frame feels flimsy by comparison. Its durability came into question when I adjusted the A01 Plus' temple arms to center the screens. They require more of a g …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Xreal新增强现实眼镜价格便宜得多，几乎完美
zh.summary: Xreal新推出的299美元A01 Plus增强现实眼镜采用轻量级设计，重量仅62克，在这个价格范围内显示屏亮度和对比度惊人。虽然449美元1S的精简版耐久性较低，但对于休闲AR用户来说提供了极好的价值。

title: Doom’s new expansion shows just what makes id Software special
summary: Id Software's new Doom expansion Revelations adds a powerful weapon and demonic levels, showcasing the studio's expertise in fast-paced shooter design. The launch has been overshadowed by Xbox's recent mass layoffs affecting the gaming industry.
content:
This week should have been a celebration for Doom developer id Software. The studio just launched Revelations, a meaty expansion for Doom: The Dark Ages that adds a powerful new weapon and more demonic levels to blast through. Even though I hadn't picked up The Dark Ages for more than a year, it only took moments before I fell right back into the familiar loop from id's modern Doom games. Each plays differently, but they all have a similar foundation built around fast-paced shooter action that makes them feel iconically Doom - and unlike pretty much anything else.
But instead the launch has been overshadowed. As part of Xbox's mass layoffs  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Doom的新扩展展现了id Software的独特之处
zh.summary: id Software的新Doom扩展包Revelations增加了一件强大的武器和恶魔级别，展示了工作室在快速射击游戏设计方面的专业知识。该发布被Xbox最近的大规模裁员所掩盖，这些裁员影响了整个游戏产业。

title: Wally Funk, last of Mercury 13 and oldest woman in space, dies at 87
summary: Wally Funk, the last surviving member of the Mercury 13 astronaut program and oldest woman to reach space, died at age 87. She was a pioneering figure in both aviation and space exploration despite decades of barriers to women in these fields.
content: "I have been waiting a long time to finally get up there..."

zh.title: 水星13计划最后幸存者、太空中最年长女性沃利·冯克逝世，享年87岁
zh.summary: 沃利·冯克是水星13计划最后在世的成员和到达太空年纪最大的女性，于87岁去世。尽管女性在航空和太空探索领域面临数十年的障碍，但她是这两个领域的先驱人物。

title: Is an air-conditioning revolution coming to Europe?
summary: Environmentally friendly cooling technology advances may spark an air-conditioning revolution in Europe, potentially resolving cultural debates over AC adoption. The technological improvements could change European attitudes toward climate control.
content: The AC culture wars may be solved by advances in environmentally friendly technology.

zh.title: 欧洲的空调革命即将来临吗？
zh.summary: 环保冷却技术的进步可能会在欧洲引发空调革命，并有可能解决关于空调采用的文化辩论。技术改进可能会改变欧洲人对气候控制的态度。

title: Rocket Report: "Panic" over Transporter availability; Isar to launch from Canada
summary: The latest Rocket Report covers industry concerns about Transporter rocket availability constraints and Isar's plans to launch from Canada. Ariane 6 continues its ramp-up with active industry collaboration.
content: "We are delighted to actively help shape the ramp-up of the Ariane 6."

zh.title: 火箭报告："恐慌"笼罩运输火箭可用性；Isar将从加拿大发射
zh.summary: 最新的火箭报告涵盖了业界对运输火箭可用性限制的担忧，以及Isar从加拿大发射的计划。Ariane 6在业界积极合作下继续加快步伐。

title: Like a cheat code for your car: We investigate ECU tuning
summary: ECU tuning has escalated into an arms race between automakers implementing vehicle chip locks and independent tuners developing methods to bypass them. The underground aftermarket practice reflects broader tensions over vehicle ownership and control.
content: Now it's an arms race between OEMs locking down chips and tuners trying to crack them.

zh.title: 就像给你的车装上作弊码：ECU调谐调查
zh.summary: ECU调谐已升级为一场军备竞赛，汽车制造商实施芯片锁定，而独立调谐商则开发绕过方法。这种地下改装业务反映了关于车辆所有权和控制权的深层矛盾。

title: Polestar owners left ‘holding the bag’ after EV brand pulls out of the US
summary: Polestar is exiting the US market starting with 2027 models after the federal government denied authorization over Chinese-made connected vehicle software concerns. Thousands of current owners and dealers face uncertainty regarding future service, parts, and warranty support.
content:
Last month, Polestar shocked the auto industry when it announced that it was pulling out of the US. 
The EV company's decision came after the federal government denied its authorization to continue selling its cars despite a rule banning vehicles with Chinese-made connected vehicle software. Polestar, which is headquartered in Sweden but majority owned by China's Geely, said it would stop selling its vehicles in the US starting with the 2027 model year.
For the thousands of Polestar owners and dozens of dealers in the US, it was a moment of disappointment and uncertainty. What would happen with their vehicles? Who would service them? Would …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Polestar品牌退出美国市场后，车主被迫"接盘"
zh.summary: 由于联邦政府以中国制造的联网车辆软件为由拒绝授权，Polestar将从2027年款车型开始退出美国市场。数千名现有车主和经销商对未来的服务、零部件和保修支持感到不确定。

title: Instagram and Facebook will likely require a redesign after EU rules they’re ‘addictive’
summary: Meta faces potential $12 billion fines and mandatory redesigns of Instagram and Facebook after an EU investigation found both platforms violate the Digital Services Act through addictive design features. The Commission cited personalized recommendations, autoplay, and infinite scroll as particularly harmful to minors and vulnerable users.
content:
Meta is in breach of the EU's Digital Services Act (DSA), a preliminary investigation has found, over the "addictive" design of Instagram and Facebook. It's likely to be forced to redesign both apps and could face a fine of up to $12 billion.
The European Commission said Meta "did not adequately assess the risks of its addictive design on the physical and mental wellbeing of users, including minors and vulnerable adults." It singled out features like personalized recommendations, autoplay, and infinite scroll, arguing that they "fuel the user's urge to keep scrolling and shift the brain into 'autopilot mode.'"
The report also criticizes th …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 欧盟认定Instagram和Facebook"令人上瘾"，两平台或面临强制重新设计
zh.summary: Meta因欧盟调查发现其Instagram和Facebook通过成瘾性设计特性违反《数字服务法》而面临最高120亿美元罚款和强制重新设计。欧盟委员会指出，个性化推荐、自动播放和无限滚动对未成年人和弱势用户特别有害。

title: After Apple, India’s smartphone manufacturing boom enters new phase with Vivo JV
summary: Vivo is expanding smartphone manufacturing in India through a joint venture, potentially establishing a model for other Chinese phone makers to follow Apple's success in the region. This represents a significant shift in global smartphone manufacturing as companies diversify away from traditional production hubs.
content: Vivo's joint venture could become a template for Chinese smartphone makers in India.

zh.title: 苹果之后，印度智能手机制造业迎来Vivo合资新阶段
zh.summary: Vivo正通过合资企业扩大在印度的智能手机制造，可能为其他中国手机制造商建立效仿苹果在该地区成功的模式。这代表全球智能手机制造的重大转变，企业正在远离传统生产中心。

title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
summary: OpenAI's new GPT-5.6 model family will continue powering Microsoft's Copilot 365 suite of workplace apps, signaling continued partnership despite speculation about the companies' relationship.
content: OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.

zh.title: OpenAI称GPT 5.6是Microsoft Copilot 365的"首选模型" 尽管存在分手传言
zh.summary: OpenAI新推出的GPT-5.6模型系列将继续为Microsoft Copilot 365办公应用套件提供支持，尽管两家公司的关系引发猜测，但这表明双方继续保持合作关系。

title: Don’t want to invest in Elon Musk? Two new ETFs explicitly exclude him
summary: Two new ETFs have launched that explicitly exclude companies founded, controlled, or led by Elon Musk, including Tesla and SpaceX. This reflects growing investor appetite for portfolio customization based on founder preferences.
content: The new exchanged-traded funds exclude companies that are founded, controlled, or led by Elon Musk. That means no SpaceX or Tesla.

zh.title: 不想投资埃隆·马斯克？两只新ETF明确排除他的公司
zh.summary: 两只新ETF已推出，明确排除由埃隆·马斯克创办、控制或领导的公司，包括特斯拉和SpaceX。这反映了投资者对根据创始人偏好定制投资组合的日益增长的需求。

title: Microsoft’s carbon emissions went up 25 percent last year
summary: Microsoft's carbon emissions jumped 25 percent in 2025 to 34 million metric tons, driven primarily by datacenter expansion and changes to renewable energy purchasing practices. This threatens its goal to become carbon negative by 2030.
content:
Microsoft may once again be struggling to keep up with its own climate goals, according to its 2026 sustainability report. As reported by GeekWire, the report states that Microsoft's carbon emissions increased 25 percent in 2025, totalling 34 million metric tons "without select interventions." Microsoft says this was "driven primarily by the expansion of our datacenter infrastructure," as well as the company's decision last February to stop purchasing "non-additional, unbundled renewable energy certificates." 
Several years ago, Microsoft set itself a goal to be carbon negative by 2030, meaning it will need to remove more carbon emissions t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软去年碳排放量增加了25%
zh.summary: 微软2025年的碳排放量增长25%至3400万吨，主要由数据中心扩展和可再生能源采购实践的变化驱动。这威胁到了该公司在2030年前实现碳负排的目标。
